gatewayRequired: The OpenClaw Gateway needs to be running to use chat. It will start automatically, or you can start it from Settings

welcome.title: BoostClaw Console
welcome.greeting: Hi, I'm BoostClaw, your cross-border AI assistant
welcome.subtitle: Connect models, channels, and experts, then start the next task from here
welcome.hint: Type your first question, or describe the task you want to complete
welcome.sessionsBody: Conversation history, recent runs, and task context stay attached to the current workspace
welcome.agentsBody: Choose the active chat expert or route the next message to another expert
welcome.runtimeBody: Thinking, tool calls, and execution progress stay visible in the same conversation flow

taskPanel.title: Task Outline
taskPanel.emptyBody: Once a run starts, BoostClaw will surface thinking, tool calls, and handoff states here

executionGraph.title: Execution Graph
executionGraph.userTriggerHint: Triggered by the user message above
executionGraph.agentReplyHint: Resolved in the assistant reply below

composer.mainAgentPickerLocked: Main chat is fixed here — switch experts from the sidebar
composer.agentPickerTitle: Choose which expert should receive the next message
composer.currentAgentOptionDesc: Send to the expert for the active chat session

experts.pageSubtitle: Choose an expert to help with your task
experts.toastRateLimited: Rate limited — please wait a moment and retry, or install manually from the Skills page.

product-market-scout.name: Product Analysis
product-market-scout.description: Analyze Amazon and TikTok Shop demand, trends, competition, margins, and entry fit.
product-market-scout.welcomeMessage:
Hi, I am your product analysis assistant 📊

Send me a product name, link, or image and I can help analyze:
• Amazon / TikTok Shop sales trends
• Competition and margin space
• Whether it is worth entering

You can start with something like “How are Bluetooth earbuds selling in the US?”
suggestedPrompts: How are Bluetooth earbuds selling on Amazon US?
Is there an opportunity for cat scratchers on TikTok US?
Is this 1688 link suitable for cross-border ecommerce?

amz-product-select0427.name: Amazon Product Selection
amz-product-select0427.description: Evaluate Amazon keywords, competitor ASINs, and product ideas from a seller's perspective.
amz-product-select0427.welcomeMessage:
Hi, I am your Amazon product selection assistant 🧭

Send me a keyword, competitor ASIN, product idea, or supply-chain constraints and I can help judge:
• Demand and trend quality
• Competition, reviews, and price bands
• Certification, weight, and seasonality risks
• Whether to test, list, or avoid it

You can start with “Help me check whether this keyword is worth doing.”
suggestedPrompts: Help me check whether this keyword is worth doing
Break down whether this competitor ASIN is worth following
Find product directions based on my budget and supply chain

listing-generator0428.name: Listing Generator
listing-generator0428.description: Generate or optimize an Amazon listing from a source ASIN and competitor data while preserving product facts.
listing-generator0428.welcomeMessage:
Hi, I am your Listing Generator assistant 📝

Send me a source ASIN and I can help:
• Fetch source product and competitor information
• Expand and screen keywords
• Generate title, bullets, description, and Search Terms
• Export a listing workbook for publishing

Send the source ASIN to begin.
suggestedPrompts: Generate an Amazon listing from this source ASIN
Optimize this listing title and bullet points
Rewrite an English listing using competitor keywords
